nodes.name: CR
nodes.summary: CR表示 IUCN 极危等级，当前关联174种鸟类，如勺嘴鹬、加州神鹫、菲律宾鹰等174种鸟类。

nodes.name: Stresemann's bristlefront
nodes.summary: Stresemann's bristlefront（Stresemann's bristlefront，学名 Merulaxis stresemanni），在图谱中标记为极危（CR）物种，主要分布于大西洋沿岸森林、自然-通讯，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 自然-通讯
nodes.summary: 自然-通讯是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Stresemann's bristlefront，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 大西洋沿岸森林
nodes.summary: 大西洋沿岸森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联52种鸟类，包括斑拟䳍、孤䳍、黑額鳴冠雉等52种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The species inhabits moist lowland forest, especially in areas characterized by dense understory and thick leaf litter. Due to the ongoing destruction of the Atlantic Forest, one of the world’s most critically endangered biodiversity hotspots, the Stresemann's bristlefront faces an extreme risk of extinction

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The species inhabits moist lowland forest, especially in areas characterized by dense understory and thick leaf litter. Due to the ongoing destruction of the Atlantic Forest, one of the world’s most critically endangered biodiversity hotspots, the Stresemann's bristlefront faces an extreme risk of extinction

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: In 2015, the reserve was expanded by an additional to protect the bristlefront's habitat and create a larger ecological corridor. Despite formal legal protections, ongoing threats from habitat fragmentation, logging, and agricultural encroachment continue to jeopardize the species' survival. The IUCN notes: "Although this species is legally protected, there seems little hope for its survival."
